summary: All 34 backend API tests passed for section-specific staff and checklist items features. Tested: (1) Section-specific staff endpoints (GET/POST/DELETE) for all 7 sections including top_room, (2) Staff independence between sections verified, (3) Checklist items in section-tasks with proper structure, (4) PUT saves and GET returns checklist_items, (5) Checklist items independence between sections, (6) top_room included as valid section key, (7) Backward compatibility with existing staff-list and cleaning-tasks endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix during test runs and cleaned up afterwards. Some sections (dough_section, packing_section, top_room, supervisor, sales_team) have checklist_items data from test runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All section-staff and section-tasks (with checklist_items) APIs working correctly for all 7 sections: top_room, dough_section, packing_section, angels_prep, cleaning_facilities, supervisor, sales_team. Tests verified: (1) GET /api/admin/section-staff/{section_key} returns staff list per section, (2) POST /api/admin/section-staff/{section_key}/add adds staff to ONLY that section (independence verified), (3) DELETE /api/admin/section-staff/{section_key}/{staff_id} removes staff from specific section, (4) GET /api/admin/section-tasks/{section_key} returns checklist_items with id/label/notes_when/notes_placeholder fields, (5) PUT /api/admin/section-tasks/{section_key} saves checklist_items, (6) Checklist items are independent per section, (7) Invalid section keys return 400, (8) Authentication required for all endpoints.
